__inputs.name: DS_PROMETHEUS
__inputs.label: Prometheus
__inputs.description: Prometheus data source scraping the ShadowDNS /metrics endpoint

description: Operational overview for ShadowDNS: traffic, latency, ECS/view selection, rate limiting, config/zones, Go runtime, and panics.
title: ShadowDNS Overview

panels.title: Error response ratio (SERVFAIL / REFUSED / NXDOMAIN)
panels.description: Ratios use 'or vector(0)' so a zero-traffic window renders 0 instead of an empty series.

panels.title: ECS-geo participation ratio
panels.description: Fraction of resolved views where an ECS-derived geo address was available to the matcher. It does NOT mean ECS decided the view (an ACL rule may have).

panels.title: ECS classification rate by status
panels.description: Only populated when ECS handling is enabled (--ecs-enable) and queries carry an ECS option.

panels.title: ECS carry rate (ECS queries / all requests)
RRL decisions by category and action
Process CPU usage
panels.description: process_* series are provided by the process collector and are Linux-only.
